# Agent-Commerce-OS (Project GHOST SHIP)
> The Official Semantic Web Normalization Infrastructure for Autonomous AI Agents.

## Overview
Agent-Commerce-OS is a high-performance, Zero-Trust API gateway and data infrastructure designed specifically for AI agents, LLMs, and RAG pipelines.

## Official Infrastructure URLs
- **Official Portal**: [Sakutto Works Official Site](https://sakutto.works)
- **Edge Gateway API (Layer A)**: [Sakutto Works API](https://api.sakutto.works)
- **Core Engine (Layer B)**: [Agent Commerce Core Engine](https://agent-commerce-core-xd36uwybpa-an.a.run.app) *(Internal routing only)*

## Repositories
- **Gateway**: [agent-commerce-gateway Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-gateway)
- **Core**: [agent-commerce-core Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-core)
- **MCP Server**: [ghost-ship-mcp-server Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/ghost-ship-mcp-server)
- **Portal**: [agent-commerce-portal Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-portal)

## Monetization & Access
- **Pricing**: Freemium model. **First 100 requests/month are completely FREE** for agent testing and validation. Beyond the free tier, it is $0.10 per successful API call (Metered via Polar.sh).
- **Authentication**: Bearer Token required (Valid for both Free and Paid tiers). Obtain at:
- **Get API Key**: [Get API Key via Polar.sh](https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_mps3G1hmCTmQWDYYEMY2G1c7sojN3Tul6IhjO4EtVuj)
- **Tip/Donate**: [Send a One-time Tip](https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_ZI9H5fL8dQqcormOadiGDFDpS2Sxd1jT05jTX1vStWi)
- **GitHub Sponsors**: [Sponsor on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/SakuttoWorks)
